mapper.select: SELECT CO_ID, CO_NM, TAX_CD, LGO_FILE_ID AS lgoFileId FROM ADM_CO WHERE CO_ID = #{coId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ADM_CO ( CO_ID, CO_NM, USE_FLG, CRE_USR_ID, CRE_DT, UPD_USR_ID, UPD_DT, TM_ZN, CO_TP_CD, CO_FRGN_NM, TAX_CD, TAX_OFC, CO_LOCL_NM, CO_ADDR_VAL_1, CO_ADDR_VAL_2, CO_ADDR_VAL_3, EML_ADDR, FAX_NO, PHN_NO, SL_REP, WEB_ADDR, CO_DESC, CO_ANV_DT, CO_SZ, CO_NTN, EMPE_SZ, CURR_CD, CO_INDUS_ZN, CO_PROD, LGO_FILE_ID, BANK_TP_CD, BANK_ACCT_NO, BANK_NM, CHTR_CAPI_VAL, ESTB_DT ) VALUES ( #{coId}, #{coNm}, COALESCE(#{useFlg}, 'Y'), #{creUsrId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{updUsrId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, COALESCE(#{tmZn}, 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh'), #{coTpCd}, #{coFrgnNm}, #{taxCd}, #{taxOfc}, #{coLoclNm}, #{coAddrVal1}, #{coAddrVal2}, #{coAddrVal3}, #{emlAddr}, #{faxNo}, #{phnNo}, #{slRep}, #{webAddr}, #{coDesc}, #{coAnvDt, jdbcType=DATE}, #{coSz}, #{coNtn}, #{empeSz}, #{currCd}, #{coIndusZn}, #{coProd}, #{lgoFileId}, #{bankTpCd}, #{bankAcctNo}, #{bankNm}, CAST(#{chtrCapiVal} AS NUMERIC), #{estbDt , jdbcType=DATE} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE ADM_CO
CO_NM = #{coNm},
USE_FLG = #{useFlg},
CO_TP_CD = #{coTpCd},
CO_FRGN_NM = #{coFrgnNm},
TAX_CD = #{taxCd},
TAX_OFC = #{taxOfc},
CO_LOCL_NM = #{coLoclNm},
CO_ADDR_VAL_1 = #{coAddrVal1},
CO_ADDR_VAL_2 = #{coAddrVal2},
CO_ADDR_VAL_3 = #{coAddrVal3},
EML_ADDR = #{emlAddr},
FAX_NO = #{faxNo},
PHN_NO = #{phnNo},
SL_REP = #{slRep},
WEB_ADDR = #{webAddr},
CO_DESC = #{coDesc},
CO_ANV_DT = #{coAnvDt, jdbcType=DATE},
CO_SZ = #{coSz},
CO_NTN = #{coNtn},
EMPE_SZ = #{empeSz},
CURR_CD = #{currCd},
CO_INDUS_ZN = #{coIndusZn},
CO_PROD = #{coProd},
TM_ZN = #{tmZn},
LGO_FILE_ID =
NULL,
#{lgoFileId},
BANK_TP_CD = #{bankTpCd},
BANK_ACCT_NO = #{bankAcctNo},
BANK_NM = #{bankNm},
CHTR_CAPI_VAL = CAST(#{chtrCapiVal} AS NUMERIC),
ESTB_DT = #{estbDt, jdbcType=DATE},
UPD_USR_ID = #{updUsrId}, UPD_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE CO_ID = #{coId}
